# Support

## Support Level: Maintained

`srt-slurm-recipes` is actively maintained by NVIDIA. Issues and pull requests
are reviewed on a best-effort basis. There is no guaranteed response time or
service-level agreement.

## How to Get Help

- **Bugs and feature requests** — Open an issue using the
  [issue templates](ISSUE_TEMPLATE). Please search existing issues first
  to avoid duplicates.
- **Questions** — Open a GitHub issue describing what you are trying to do.
- **Recipe contributions** — See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Upstream Tool

This repository contains sweep configuration only. For issues with benchmark
execution, the `srtctl` CLI, or launch behavior, file them upstream in
[NVIDIA/srt-slurm](https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm).

## Security

Do not file public issues for security reports. Follow the disclosure process in
[SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
